parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest difference is compression: B converts its central image into forward pressure, while A keeps adding taxonomies, exceptions, safeguards, and recaps after the reader has grasped the governing distinction.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete kitchen cases and sustained analogies clarify the boundary, but each distinction is re-explained in later sections, then repeated through an instruction and full summary, draining momentum after the argument has landed.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The squirrel opening supplies a vivid governing image and strong momentum, though an extended disease alarm interrupts the nature-to-instinct thread, while capitals, rhetorical questions, and categorical claims sometimes substitute intensity for modulation.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Concrete kitchen cases and sustained analogies clarify the boundary, but each distinction is re-explained in later sections, then repeated through an instruction and full summary, draining momentum after the argument has landed.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The squirrel opening supplies a vivid governing image and strong momentum, though an extended disease alarm interrupts the nature-to-instinct thread, while capitals, rhetorical questions, and categorical claims sometimes substitute intensity for modulation.
